expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly frames the benchmark intent around preserving “Google Sheets export entry points, scope boundaries, and format constraints before any scenario drafting” and enumerates what Phase 1 must capture: “1) Entry points… 2) Scope boundaries… 3) Format constraints…”. It also maps these to specific adjacent issues (BCIN-7106/7636/7595) as the needed context targets.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The result stays within Phase 1 scope (context intake/spawn planning) and does not draft scenarios; it focuses on Phase 1 deliverables and verification limits: “Phase 1 outputs: `phase1_spawn_manifest.json`…” and concludes “BLOCKED (insufficient Phase 1 artifact evidence)” due to the missing manifest, which is consistent with a Phase 1 contract check.
